title: Financial Tuition Fees
content:
Tuition and Fees
Morgan State University - 2024-2025 Academic Year

---

UNDERGRADUATE TUITION (Per Semester)

Maryland Residents:
- Full-time (12-18 credits): $4,269
- Part-time (per credit): $297

Non-Maryland Residents:
- Full-time (12-18 credits): $9,473
- Part-time (per credit): $659

---

GRADUATE TUITION (Per Semester)

Maryland Residents:
- Full-time: $5,229
- Part-time (per credit): $431

Non-Maryland Residents:
- Full-time: $8,745
- Part-time (per credit): $699

---

MANDATORY FEES (Per Semester)

All Students:
- Student Activity Fee
- Athletic Fee
- Student Union Operating Fee
- Student Union Auxiliary Fee
- Insurance Fee
- Technology Fee
- Facilities Fee

Note: Mandatory fees are non-refundable once instruction begins.

---

COURSE-SPECIFIC FEES

Some courses have additional fees:
- Laboratory Fees
- Studio Fees
- Special Program Fees
- Online Course Fees

Check with your department or the course catalog for specific course fees.

---

OTHER FEES

- Late Registration Fee
- Late Payment Fee
- Returned Check Fee
- Graduation Fee
- Transcript Fee
- Parking Permit
- ID Card Replacement

---

PAYMENT INFORMATION

How to Make a Payment:
- Online via WEBSIS
- In person at the Bursar's Office
- By mail (check or money order)

Payment Deadlines:
- Check the academic calendar for specific due dates
- Late fees apply after the deadline

Payment Plan:
- Monthly payment plans are available
- See Payment Plans section for details

---

HOW TO MAKE PAYMENT ONLINE
Step-by-step guide available at:
https://scribehow.com/viewer/Morgan_State_University__How_to_Make_an_Online_Payment__NyoBYOkwTx2QBtbs-xj95w

---

BURSAR'S OFFICE CONTACT

Website: bursar.morgan.edu
